sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 23:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 23:1
items.html: The coarseness in the emanated being, meaning the desire in it, are called the sum total of the substance of the emanated being. These four phases in the coarseness are called “four forms.” (Part 3, Chapter 6, item 4)
